posts.author: deepakreads
posts.text: There is lot of buying in the stock. Rajeev Desai has mentioned about stock. It might be short lived one. The agreement with reliance industries will take about 3 years i.e by 2029 for revenue or profit to reflect in numbers. Since its a long way, I don’t think rally will sustain. Might be traders driving the buying. But definitely, it gives company big exposure and credentials in profile. In one of the concall, promoters had mentioned about 2 big contracts they are pursuing. One was reliance and other still yet to come. Hopefully it will happen in near future.
